front: How do drug transporters affect pharmacokinetics?
back: Efflux transporters (P-gp/MDR1, BCRP, MRP2) limit oral bioavailability and CNS penetration. Influx transporters (OATP1B1, OCT2, PEPT1) enhance absorption. Genetic polymorphisms in transporters cause interindividual variability in drug exposure.
